title: Upgrade salary calculator: custom inputs, AI VN economic context and Gen Z analysis
description: Upgrade the salary calculator to allow custom job title, salary, hours/shift, and cost of living. Detect job type and evaluate based on real Vietnamese economy using AI, and write analysis in Gen Z language.

title: Redesign salary calculator: custom inputs, AI/fallback classification and exploitation alert
description: Redesign the salary calculator to allow custom job names, salaries, daily working hours, and cost of living. Detect job type using AI/API or fallback rules, and alert on exploitative wages.

title: Remove rainbow preloader and fix transparent mascot sticker background
description: Remove the spinning preloader component from App.tsx and execute a crop-and-clean script to extract the teacher mascot without checkerboard grids or silhouettes.

title: Provide project context to Thầy Nam AI chatbot
description: Introduce project features and reason for creation to the chatbot so it can explain them to users

title: Optimize AI Keys and Set 12s Timeout
description: Move Key 3 to first position, implement 12-second request timeouts, persist key cooldowns, and break model loop on key exhaustion.

title: Fix AI Latency and Timeout Fallback
description: Persist key cooldowns in localStorage, break model loop immediately on 429 to avoid trying models on exhausted keys, and add 8-second request timeouts to client and server proxy.

title: Optimize AI Cache and Model Fallback
description: Extend client-side AI cache duration to 30 days and implement automatic model fallback (rotation) between Gemini 2.5 Flash, 1.5 Flash, and 1.5 Pro to optimize free quota usage.

title: Optimize Dark CEO Typography
description: Adjust font sizes, families, and weights in the Dark CEO sub-module to improve readability. This includes adjusting text sizes in SlackChatPanel, CeoStatsBar, and DarkCeoGame.

title: Redesign Dark CEO Game according to plan
description: Update darkCeoData.ts with the 18 crises described in dark_ceo_redesign.md, fix impacts/values, and align crisis definitions. Update CeoStatsBar.tsx and DarkCeoGame.tsx as specified.
close_reason: Redesigned Dark CEO crises, added safety hint labels and win-tip tooltips to stats bar, and verified gameplay in browser

title: Fix AI Response Truncation
description: Increase maxOutputTokens for Gemini API to handle thoughts/reasoning and adjust InlineQuizChat height

title: Implement central pop-up modal for AI commentaries
description: Create a central scrollable modal popup for both CardBattle Synthesis and SimEcon Forecast to ensure no AI text is hidden by layout.

title: Fix AI commentary truncation on Vercel and optimize UI display
description: Fix API proxy parts truncation and add scroll/max-height to AI commentary views in CardBattle and SimEcon.

title: Add interactive draggable anime mascot AI assistant
description: Create a floating anime chibi version of the teacher on all views that opens a chat interface when clicked, with full support for smooth dragging.

title: Redesign homepage cards and improve subpage contrast
description: Use the provided course guide DOCX/PDF and screenshot direction to evaluate current web content, redesign homepage as large clickable feature cards, and improve subpage UI contrast so white particle effects do not wash out content.
close_reason: Fixed z-index of floating particles to show on all subpages and ensured readability

title: Reduce particle density by thirty percent
description: User requested reducing the current floating particle density by 3/10 from the current value.
close_reason: Set floating particle density multiplier to 0.24 as requested.

title: Make rainbow effect draggable corner widget
description: Convert the rainbow crack/preloader effect from hero background decoration into a small draggable corner component, and slightly reduce particle density again.
close_reason: Converted rainbow effect to a small draggable fixed widget and reduced particle density from 0.66 to 0.58.

title: Add rainbow rotating preloader effect
description: User provided CSS for rotating star/crack preloader and requested applying it to the project with seven rainbow colors.

title: Slightly reduce particle density
description: User requested a very small additional reduction to the global floating particle density while preserving the current bottom-up and mouse-avoid behavior.
close_reason: Reduced particle density multiplier slightly from 0.72 to 0.66.

title: Make particles emerge from bottom on page load
description: Ensure floating particles start below the viewport on initial web open or reload, then visibly rise from the bottom instead of appearing already scattered on screen.
close_reason: Changed initial particle spawning so reload starts below the viewport and rises from the bottom instead of randomizing particles across the screen.

title: Add interactive floating white particles globally
description: User requested more white floating particles across every page, moving upward 1.7x faster/current density and dodging the mouse cursor.
close_reason: Implemented global interactive floating white particles with reduced density and bottom-up initial emergence.
